entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume crop being studied for disease resistance.

entities.name: FUSARIUM WILT
entities.description: A fungal disease affecting chickpea plants.

entities.name: FUSARIUM WILT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of chickpea cultivars to resist Fusarium wilt.

entities.name: CDNA-SCOT
entities.description: A methodology for investigating differential gene expression using start codon targeted markers.

entities.name: DIFFERENTIAL GENE EXPRESSION
entities.description: The difference in gene expression levels between resistant and susceptible cultivars.

entities.name: DIFFERENTIALLY EXPRESSED FRAGMENTS
entities.description: Fragments identified through cDNA-SCoT profiling that vary between cultivars.

entities.name: SANGER SEQUENCING
entities.description: A method used to determine the nucleotide sequence of the DEFs.

entities.name: NBLAST HOMOLOGY SEARCH
entities.description: A program used to characterize the functional properties of DEFs by comparing them to known sequences.

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL GENES
entities.description: Genes that perform specific biological functions, identified via DEFs.

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A process of selecting plants for specific traits using genetic markers.
